---
title: "Research"
listing:
  id: research
  type: grid
  contents:
    - BPMS/index_BPMS.qmd
    - ExMove/index_ExMove.qmd
    - IoS-seabirds/index_IoS.qmd
    - kittiwakes/index_kittiwakes.qmd
    - PhD/index_phd.qmd
    - Polar-seabirds/index_polar-seabirds.qmd
    - MSci/index_MSci.qmd
  fields: [image, title]
page-layout: full
---
